features: ELEGANT DESIGN: Luxurious gold-toned glass bottle with distinctive ribbed cap and faceted body design, perfect for displaying on your vanity
GENEROUS SIZE: 100ml eau de toilette in a sophisticated geometric bottle that combines elegance with practicality
PACKAGING: Presented in an elegant white and gold box featuring diagonal metallic accents, making it an ideal gift choice
FRAGRANCE TYPE: Pour femme (women's) eau de toilette formulation for sophisticated daily wear
PREMIUM QUALITY: Crystal-clear glass construction with precisely engineered spray mechanism for optimal fragrance distribution
description: Product description Introducing Adore You Pour Femme, an exquisite eau de toilette that embodies feminine elegance and sophistication. This captivating fragrance comes in a stunning 100ml gold-accented glass bottle, featuring a distinctive geometric design with luxurious ribbed metallic top. The bottle's elegant silhouette combines contemporary aesthetics with timeless charm, making it a beautiful addition to any vanity. The sophisticated packaging showcases diagonal gold lines against a pristine white background, reflecting the premium nature of this scent. Perfect for daily wear or special occasions, this eau de toilette offers a refined olfactory experience in an eye-catching vessel that's as remarkable as the fragrance it contains. The generous 100ml size ensures long-lasting enjoyment of this distinguished scent. Safety Warning For External Use Only
